# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please do not disclose security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues,
discussions, or pull requests.

Use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting to contact the maintainers:

https://github.com/Actrium/rill/security/advisories/new

Please include as much of the following information as possible:

- the affected component, version, or commit;
- the security impact and expected threat model;
- steps to reproduce the issue, including a minimal proof of concept when
  appropriate;
- any known mitigations or suggested fixes; and
- whether and how you would like to be credited.

The maintainers will review the report privately and coordinate remediation and
disclosure with the reporter. Please keep the vulnerability confidential until
a fix is available and a disclosure timeline has been agreed upon.

Security fixes are generally applied to the latest maintained release and the
default branch. Reports affecting older versions will be evaluated case by
case.

---

# 安全策略

## 报告安全漏洞

请勿通过公开的 GitHub Issue、Discussion 或 Pull Request 披露安全漏洞。

请使用 GitHub 私密漏洞报告功能联系维护者：

https://github.com/Actrium/rill/security/advisories/new

提交报告时，请尽可能提供以下信息：

- 受影响的组件、版本或提交；
- 安全影响和预期威胁模型；
- 复现步骤，以及适当情况下的最小化概念验证；
- 已知的缓解措施或修复建议；
- 是否以及如何为你署名致谢。

维护者会私下审核报告，并与报告者协调修复和披露。在修复可用且双方商定披露时间之前，请对漏洞信息保密。

安全修复通常应用于最新维护版本和默认分支。对旧版本的影响将逐案评估。
